top_signals.title: WinGD Delivers Methanol-Capable Container Ship to Mærsk
top_signals.summary: Swiss marine power company WinGD celebrated another milestone in the shipping industry’s decarbonization journey as the Tema Mærsk, powered by its X82DF-M/E multi-fuel engine platform with methanol capability and inherent compatibility with ethanol, was successfully delivered to A.P.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Dogecoin gains access to Paxos network used by PayPal and Venmo
top_signals.summary: House of Doge struck partnership with Paxos to integrate DOGE across the firm's enterprise-grade brokerage and custody infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
